context_note: Netherlands vs Sweden, WC2026 Group C. Netherlands moderate favorite: λ_NED=1.93, λ_SWE=1.10. FTR: Netherlands 56.18%, Draw 24.10%, Sweden 20.21%. Draw=24.10%, just below RULE8 threshold (25%) — RULE8 does NOT fire. Open attacking match expected: BTTS 61.36%, OU2.5 Over 59.53%. Sweden has world-class attackers Gyökeres (Sporting CP, 40+ goals in 24-25) and Isak (Newcastle). Netherlands have Gakpo, van Dijk, multiple attack options. RULE15 applies to Gyökeres (Sweden 20.21% underdog) — mild application (-5pp). No RULE15 for Gakpo (NED expected winner). Most corners: Netherlands 65.54% (dominant set-piece side).

rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw=24.10% is just below the 25% threshold. RULE8 does NOT fire. Normal estimation approach.
rules_applied.RULE15_Gyokeres_mild: Sweden 20.21% win prob → moderate underdog. Gyökeres is expected-loser primary forward. Apply mild RULE15: -5pp from model. λ_GYO_2H=0.449 → P(≥1 SOT in 2H)=0.362 → 0.31 after RULE15.
rules_applied.No_RULE15_Gakpo: Netherlands is the expected winner (56.18%). Gakpo is NED's primary forward. RULE15 does NOT apply. Trust liquid market directly.
rules_applied.Q1_revised_offsides_rule: NED is the ATTACKING FAVORITE, NOT a defensive underdog. The 2+ offsides family (0.10-0.22) applies only to defensive underdogs. For NED: estimate from λ_off. λ_NED_goals=1.93 → λ_NED_off≈1.3 (Dutch attacking style). P(≥2|1.3)=0.373. No direct market — moderate lean YES but below crowd estimate.
rules_applied.Q2_both_SOT_2H: No direct BTTS-SOT-2H market. Derive from λ_SOT_2H: P(NED≥1)=0.955 × P(SWE≥1)=0.830 = 0.792. SOT threshold much lower than scoring — BTTS 2H goals=0.30 confirms they're different questions.
rules_applied.Q9_no_OU7_5_market: Question asks '8 or more' = X≥8 = OU7.5 Over. Only OU8.5 available (P(≥9)=0.4895). Used model: λ_total_SOT=8.6, P(≥8)=0.627.
rules_applied.direct_markets_used: Q3=BTTS+OU2.5 direct(0.4742); Q4=2H result NED(0.4724); Q5=most cards SWE(0.4202); Q7=FTR NED via RULE1(0.5618); Q8=HT draw(0.3832); Q10=Gakpo OU0.5 liquid(0.6423).

Q1_NED_2plus_offsides.note: NED attacking favorite (56%). Not the 2+ offsides defensive-underdog family. λ_NED_off≈1.3 → P(≥2)=0.373. No direct market. Dutch attacking football style suggests moderate offside risk. Slight NO lean vs crowd (~0.50).

Q2_both_SOT_in_2H.note: Model: λ_NED_SOT_2H=3.06 → P(NED≥1)=0.955. λ_SWE_SOT_2H=1.77 → P(SWE≥1)=0.830. Combined P=0.792. Big YES lean if crowd prices lower (~0.60-0.65). SOT threshold much easier than scoring. Gyökeres/Isak/Gakpo are world-class attackers who generate shots.

Q3_BTTS_and_OU2_5.note: DIRECT liquid market: BTTS+OU2.5 Over = 0.4742. Trust the market. Open attacking match expected.

Q4_NED_more_2H_goals.note: DIRECT 2H result market: NED wins 2H = 0.4724. Trust the direct market (Skellam approximation overcounts by ignoring ties). Draw 2H = 0.3227 is substantial.

Q5_SWE_more_cards.note: DIRECT most cards market: SWE 0.4202. Trust the direct market. SWE underdog fouls more. NED 31.69%, SWE 42.02%, Draw 26.02%.

Q6_Gyokeres_SOT_2H.note: λ_GYO_full=0.811 (from liquid OU0.5=0.5556). 2H split (fraction 0.609/1.10=0.554): λ_GYO_2H=0.449. P(≥1 in 2H)=0.362. Mild RULE15 (SWE 20.21% underdog, Gyökeres expected-loser primary forward): -5pp → 0.31. No direct 2H player SOT market exists. Round to 0.32.

Q7_NED_wins.note: RULE1: FTR market NED = 0.5618 (liquid). avg(crowd_est~0.56, market 0.56) = 0.56. Straightforward.

Q8_HT_tied.note: DIRECT HT result market: Draw = 0.3832. Trust the market.

Q9_8plus_total_SOT.note: No OU7.5 market — only OU8.5 (P(≥9)=0.4895). Model: λ_NED_SOT≈5.35, λ_SWE_SOT≈3.2, λ_total=8.55. P(X≥8|λ=8.6)=0.627. Calibrated: OU8.5 market=0.4895 ≈ P(≥9|λ=8.6)=0.491 ✓. YES lean — open attacking match with two offensive teams.

Q10_Gakpo_SOT.note: DIRECT liquid market: Gakpo SOT OU0.5 = 0.6423. NED expected winner. No RULE15. Trust the market.

match_facts.notable: NED 5-1 dominant win despite fewer total corners. SWE 8 SOT with only 1 goal (NED GK very busy). Both had 3 offsides.

Q1_NED_2plus_offsides.notes: NED 3 offsides. outcome=YES. MISS — we were too low vs crowd.

Q2_both_SOT_in_2H.notes: Both scored in 2H (NED 3, SWE 1). outcome=YES. Beat crowd.

Q6_Gyokeres_SOT_2H.notes: Gyökeres did NOT get SOT in 2H (SWE had 8 total SOT but Gyökeres wasn't among them in 2H). outcome=NO. HUGE beat crowd. RULE15 validated again.

Q10_Gakpo_SOT.notes: Gakpo had SOT (NED scored 5). outcome=YES. Beat crowd.
